'''davata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:bdellid|bdellid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-v-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bdellid|bdellid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| davata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dævætæth|dævætæth]] || [[word:dævætæj|dævætæj]] || [[word:dævætæsh|dævætæsh]] || [[word:dævætæ|dævætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:davavatath|davavatath]] || [[word:davavataj|davavataj]] || [[word:davavatash|davavatash]] || [[word:davavata|davavata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:davatath|davatath]] || [[word:davataj|davataj]] || [[word:davatash|davatash]] || [[word:davata|davata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:davaftath|davaftath]] || [[word:davaftaj|davaftaj]] || [[word:davaftash|davaftash]] || [[word:davaftaf|davaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:davatatha|davatatha]] || [[word:davataja|davataja]] || [[word:davatasha|davatasha]] || [[word:davataka|davataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:davatath|davatath]] || [[word:davataj|davataj]] || [[word:davatash|davatash]] || [[word:davata|davata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:davatathal|davatathal]] || [[word:davatajal|davatajal]] || [[word:davatashal|davatashal]] || [[word:davatakal|davatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:davatathatha|davatathatha]] || [[word:davatajaja|davatajaja]] || [[word:davatashasha|davatashasha]] || [[word:davataka|davataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:davatathan|davatathan]] || [[word:davatajan|davatajan]] || [[word:davatashan|davatashan]] || [[word:davatakan|davatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:davatathaoro|davatathaoro]] || [[word:davatajaoro|davatajaoro]] || [[word:davatashaoro|davatashaoro]] || [[word:davatakaoro|davatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
